heading: Art. 140. Delegation by the President
label: 940 Art. 140. Delegation by the President
text: The President may delegate any authority vested in him under this chapter, and provide for the subdelegation of any such authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)94050:736.(Art. 140), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 145The word “may” is substituted for the words “is authorized to * * * to”.
